title: Customs Update: Hirnoda (Jaipur) Now an Authorized Import/Export Location
content:
# Customs Update: Hirnoda (Jaipur) Now an Authorized Import/Export Location

Ek important update hai! Government ne Customs Notification No. 12/97-Customs (N.T.) mein ek amendment announce kiya hai.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne **Notification No. 40/2026-Customs (N.T.) dated April 23, 2026** publish kiya hai. Is notification ke through:

*   **Hirnoda (Jaipur) included:** Rajasthan state ke liye, Village Hirnoda, Jaipur ko ab imported goods ko unload karne aur export goods ko load karne ke liye authorized location bana diya gaya hai.
*   **Kishangarh renumbered:** Existing Notification 12/97-Customs (N.T.) mein, Rajasthan se related table ke serial number 10 ke against "Kishangarh" entry ko item (x) se (xi) par renumber kiya gaya hai.

Yeh amendment Customs Act, 1962 ke powers ka use karke kiya gaya hai aur iska aim trade infrastructure ko enhance karna aur import-export operations ko facilitate karna hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in)

*Published on: 25 April 2026*
